operation_descriptions: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D view for the Red slice view.
Toggle on FOV/Spacing match 2D for the Red slice view.
Turn on slice intersection visibility and enable set interaction with Translate and Rotate.
Configure display settings of the mandibular curve node to show it in both 'View 1' and 'Red' views.
Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for the Red slice view.

cb_step_1.title: Is the fibula from the right leg?

cb_step_2.title: Select the mandibular segmentation node from the scene.

cb_step_3.title: Select the fibula segmentation node from the scene.

cb_step_4.title: Select the volume node that corresponds to the mandible (Mandible Volume).

cb_step_9.title: Enable slice intersection interaction
cb_step_9.instruction: Turn on slice intersection visibility, enable set interaction, then enable both Translate and Rotate.

cb_step_10.title: Adjust slice intersection
cb_step_10.instruction: Translate and rotate the cross lines in each 2D view to set the slice intersection at the desired location.

cb_step_12.title: Configure mandibular curve display
cb_step_12.instruction: Make the mandibular curve visible in both View 1 and Red views.

cb_step_13.title: Draw mandibular curve
cb_step_13.instruction: Draw the curve, then click Done.

cb_step_16.title: How many cut planes do you want?

cb_step_18.title: Place cutting plane
cb_step_18.instruction: Place this cutting plane, then click Done.

cb_step_20.title: Draw fibula line
cb_step_20.instruction: Place this line, then click Done.
